prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 15 位持续上升至 2026 年第 11 位，稳居全国顶尖高校前列，对高分考生吸引力强；但北航作为顶尖理工类院校，在航空航天、计算机等领域的标杆地位持续巩固；拥有 16 个 A- 及以上学科，其中仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程等 7 个学科获评 A+，学科实力极强，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、航空航天等专业大类社会热度持续升温；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 31.4 万人，较 2025 年（32.1 万）略降约 2%，考生总数微降对竞争有一定缓解；北航位于北京，非本省高校；安徽省非其生源大省，跨省报考热度平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1226、2026 年缩招约 8% 导致竞争加剧（位次前移），以及本省物理类考生总数略降、学校排名持续上升等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年小幅前移；预测最低位次约 1187 名，区间 1052–1322 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rank for the science group was approximately 1142→986→1695→1349→1226. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (1695), and from 2024 to 2025 it gradually recovered to around 1226, showing a forward trend in the last 2 years. The 2025 baseline is about rank 1226. The provincial science group enrollment plan: 115 in 2021–2022, 113 in 2023–2024, 112 in 2025; 2026 plan is 103, a reduction of about 8% compared to 2025, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2026, firmly among the top universities in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. As a top-tier science and engineering institution, Beihang continues to consolidate its benchmark status in aerospace, computer science, and other fields. It has 16 disciplines rated A- or above, among which 7 disciplines including Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Software Engineering are rated A+, demonstrating extremely strong disciplinary strength that highly matches the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for major categories such as computer science, artificial intelligence, and aerospace continues to rise. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in this province is about 314,000, a slight decrease of about 2% from 2025 (321,000), which somewhat eases competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, not a provincial university; Anhui is not its major source province, so cross-province application enthusiasm remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 1226, the approximately 8% enrollment reduction in 2026 leading to intensified competition (rank moving forward), as well as the slight decrease in the total number of physics category examinees in this province and the continuous rise in university ranking, it is expected that the minimum rank in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum rank: approximately 1187, range 1052–1322.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted rank approximately 1187, range 1052–1322. Candidates with rank in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 1100) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Top-Notch Program and Future Aerospace Leading Program. Candidates with rank in the middle part (around 1187) are advised to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors such as Computing and Intelligent Science and Information Science and Technology. Candidates with rank in the lower part (beyond about 1300) should prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Aerospace Category and Science Experimental Class as safety choices. All Beihang majors are enrolled under the broad Engineering Experimental Class category, and there are still opportunities for major differentiation after enrollment.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rank for the liberal arts group was approximately 606 → 644 → 617 → 713 → 447. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the rank moved back to 713, and in 2025 it moved sharply forward to 447, showing significant fluctuation. The baseline for 2025 is about rank 447. The provincial liberal arts group plan was 12 students from 2021 to 2023, 13 in 2024, and 7 in 2025 (a sharp reduction). The 2026 plan is 7 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 11th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking, a top national university. Beihang is known for its strength in science and engineering, with only a Social Science Pilot Class in liberal arts. The corresponding discipline, Foreign Language and Literature, is rated A, while Law has no separate rating. Overall, its liberal arts strength is not its forte.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of social science majors is stable. In 2026, the province has approximately 137,000 history category examinees, a slight decrease of about 3% from 2025 (141,000). Beihang is located in Beijing, not a local university. It only admits 7 liberal arts students, an extremely small quota, making the rank highly susceptible to decisions by a few high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 447, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in total history category examinees, and the fact that the 2025 rank of 447 is an abnormal forward shift (266 places ahead of the 2024 rank of 713), a certain correction is expected in 2026. The predicted minimum rank is approximately 497, with a range of 440 to 554.
